prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A full-body character design of Fang Yichen, a handsome young male scholar from late Ming Dynasty. He has extremely attractive and delicate features with a refined, scholarly face - sharp, deep-set eyes that convey intelligence and contemplation, a straight elegant nose, well-defined jawline, and smooth pale skin. His expression is calm and thoughtful, with a subtle melancholy that hints at hidden depths. 

He wears a traditional blue-gray long robe (qingse changshan) that flows gracefully to his ankles, with wide sleeves and simple elegant lines typical of scholar's attire. A leather book pouch hangs at his waist, and his posture is upright yet relaxed, embodying scholarly dignity. His build is tall and slender, with graceful proportions that emphasize his intellectual rather than physical nature.

His black hair is neatly arranged in traditional Ming Dynasty scholar style, partially tied back with the rest flowing naturally. His overall appearance radiates quiet confidence, sharp intelligence, and refined nobility despite the troubled times.

The artwork should be rendered in traditional Chinese ink wash painting style (shuimo hua), using only black, white, and gray tones to create depth and atmosphere. The brushwork should be fluid and expressive, capturing both precise details and impressionistic elements that convey the character's inner complexity and the historical period's gravity.

Full-body standing pose, centered on pure white background, no text, no symbols, no words, traditional Chinese ink painting style, monochromatic, handsome, attractive, delicate features, clear skin., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: ink_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
